programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 29
programme.desc: Zheng Wen Yu was pregnant when she was taken advantage of by her boss Ye Song Nian, the CEO of Phoenix Corporation. Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 8
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: Sok Petantang Petenteng Eh Malah Cut Off Sampai Asing
programme.desc: Senja (Dosma Hazenbosch) and Irina (Amanda Khairunnisa) were walking around campus. They happened to pass by the Mapala room. There was Bara (Jihad Alfurqon), the Mapala leader who was liked by many female students on campus. Sure enough, Senja immediately fell in love the first time she saw Bara. Because she was so fascinated by Bara, Senja tripped and fell on Langit (Farhan Rasyid) who happened to be sitting there.

programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu
programme.desc: Ojan (Masaji Wijayanto) was tricked by a thug and had to pay for 3 portions of Nadia's (Larasati Nugroho) geprek chicken. Ojan's debt was because Nadia asked him to fix her motorbike which suddenly broke down. From Nadia's conversation with her father, it turns out that Ojan also just found out that the girlfriend Ojan wanted to meet was cheating on him with Nadia's boyfriend.

programme.title: FOOD ADVENTURE - EP 8
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 59
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: Kabur Aja Dulu Daripada Jadi Baper Mulu
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Ratu (Djihan Ranti). Ratu has a lover named Fathan. Unbeknownst to Ratu, Fathan is secretly having an affair with Ratu's best friend. One day, Ratu is shocked to discover that Fathan has cheated on her and proposed to Ratu's best friend. This leaves Ratu shocked and heartbroken.

programme.title: Neng Urut Senyummu Emang Paling Kyut
programme.desc: Bondan was fired from his job. On his way home, Bondan was riding his motorcycle in a daze until he fell off. When he got home, his mother asked him to get a massage. While Bondan was sleeping, Seruni secretly massaged his feet.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 59
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: DISEBELAH ADA SURGA - EP 8
programme.desc: The story of three young men named Andhika, Gading, and Uus. All three of them lack spiritual depth. They have spent their youth living carefree lives, indulging in pleasure without a care in the world about their future.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA - EP 41
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: GAK GITU KONSEPNYA MAEMUNAH
programme.desc: Maya’s (formerly Maemunah) arrogance leads to a bizarre curse: she suddenly reeks of salted fish, threatening to end her singing career! In a twist of fate, she meets Darto, a handsome salted-fish vendor. Could their meeting be the key to breaking the smelly curse and saving her voice?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 190
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Maunya Jadian Sama Kamu Tapi Takut Dosa
programme.desc: Rosi (Rayna Snova) and Vino (Jeff Smith) broke up after Rosi’s mother accepted a bribe from Vino’s family to stay away. Years later, Vino is working as a 'ghost' in a night market haunted house. Unaware of the man behind the mask, Rosi pours her heart out to the 'ghost,' crying about how her ex cheated on her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 644
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 138
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: FOTOGRAFER MUNDURAN DONG TAMPANNYA NIKUNG
programme.desc: Surti and Rudi’s first meeting is an absolute disaster. However, as they are forced to spend more time together, Surti wonders if her genuine sincerity is enough to turn their mutual annoyance into something meaningful.

programme.title: Udah Paling Bener Nabrak Hati Ratu Jalanan
programme.desc: Tasya (Soraya Rasyid) is a beautiful girl who lives for the thrill of illegal street racing. One day, her gang's reckless stunt nearly injures one of Rendy’s (Bara Valentino) elementary students. Rendy, a dedicated teacher, confronts them in a heated argument, but the incident leads to him being unfairly fired by his principal. Now jobless and furious, Rendy blames Tasya and her gang for ruining his life

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 644
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Jarang Online Tapi On My Heart
programme.desc: Desperate to save her marriage after her husband Nada (Masaji Wijayanto) leaves, Melody visits a paranormal. She asks to 'trade in' her husband for a better version and go back to the past. The paranormal grants her wish, casting a spell that throws Melody into a time portal.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 139
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: I LEFT MY LOVE IN KEBUN JERUK
programme.desc: Sita went to Bali to visit her uncle, Pak Yusak, an orange collector known for buying crops at very low prices. Together with his son, Herdi, Pak Yusak had long dominated the orange trade in the area. Dewan, an orange farmer, fought for a price increase for the sake of fairness for the farmers, but his efforts were always rejected. At first, Sita was unaware of the conflict, but after learning about it, she chose to support Dewan. Sita's stance angered Herdi, who kicked her out.

programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start after a breakup, Saskia (Saskia Chadwick) joins an 'open trip' where she meets Yudha (Rizky Nazar), the charming group leader. programme.title: POV Disekop-Sekop Cogan 34M Followers
programme.desc: During a chaotic fight, Echa (Zoe Abbas Jackson) and El (Cinta Brian) accidentally knock Tristan (Kevin Hillers) unconscious. Panicking and thinking he’s dead, they plan to hide the 'body' to avoid jail. But just as they are about to dump him, Tristan wakes up! Instead of being angry, Tristan who was bored with his daily routine is thrilled by the adventure and asks them to take him on a vacation.

programme.title: Ek Deewane Ki Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Vikramaditya Bhonsle, a powerful politician, falls for rising actress Adaa Randhawa. Love slowly turns obsessive, forcing Adaa to make a brave, life-altering decision to survive and reclaim freedom. Release Year: 2025 Director: Milap Zaveri

programme.title: Bob Biswas
programme.desc: Bob Biswas, an insurance agent, is released from hospital after eight years in a coma and is welcomed by his wife Mary and son Benny. He has lost his memory and does not remember the past. Release Year: 2021 Director: Diya Annapurna Ghosh

programme.title: The Wife
programme.desc: Varun and Arya move into a new home for a fresh start, but a dark supernatural force turns their dream into terror and tragic consequences. Release Year: 2021 Director: Sarmad Khan

programme.title: Jurm
programme.desc: A powerful businessman is jailed for his wife's murder, forcing him to unravel betrayal and hidden truths while his perfect world collapses around him. Release Year: 1990 Director: Mahesh Bhatt

programme.title: Ishqedarriyaan
programme.desc: Aagam loves Luvleen deeply, but she loves Arjun. Choosing her happiness over his own, Aagam sacrifices his heart so she can live the life she truly wants. Release Year: 2015 Director: V.K. Prakash

programme.title: Genius
programme.desc: An orphan RAW agent loses his team during a mission and sets out on a personal quest for revenge, seeking peace through justice and sacrifice. Release Year: 2018 Director: Anil Sharma Awards: 2019 Winner Popular Award- Best Male Debut- Utkarsh Sharma

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: Abhay kidnaps greedy grooms who demand dowry and forces them into reform, but when his childhood love Babli returns, his mission and heart begin to change. Release Year: 2019 Director: Prashant Singh

programme.title: Karz
programme.desc: Monty discovers his past life murder by his greedy wife and, with his lover's support, sets out to reclaim his family honour, wealth, and lost legacy. Release Year: 1980 Director: Subhash Ghai Awards: Filmfare Awards- Best Music Director- Laxmikant Shantaram Kudalkar , Pyarelal Ramprasad Sharma .

programme.title: Hero Hindustani
programme.desc: A man realizes that India is completely alien to his London-raised granddaughter and arranges her marriage there. She gets a guide to pose as her fiance and falls for him. Release Year: 1998 Director: Aziz Sejawal

programme.title: Super Nani
programme.desc: The movie about a woman who is always insulted by her family. While her children, don't care for their mother, her grandson decides to change her. Release Year: 2014 Director: Indra Kumar

programme.desc: An orphan RAW agent loses his team during a mission and sets out on a personal quest for revenge, seeking peace through justice and sacrifice. Release Year: 2018 Director: Anil Sharma Awards: 2019 Winner Popular Award- Best Male Debut- Utkarsh Sharma

programme.title: Black & White

programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. programme.desc: A ruthless bike gang terrorizes the city and shatters order, until fearless cop Arjun rises against crime, risking his life to restore justice and bring back peace.

programme.desc: A newly married couple's relationship and reputation are put at risk when their CD is stolen. The story follows their roller coaster journey to recover the CD.

programme.title: Darling (why This Kolavari)
programme.desc: The story revolves around a movie director who has an extra-marital affair with a woman. He leaves his wife who then goes searching for her real identity.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Childhood friends Abhimanyu and Bindu face friction when she realises that she doesn't love him after a brief relationship. Years later, Abhimanyu decides to pen a story based on his life.

programme.title: Jaaneman
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Arth
programme.desc: Two friends witness a murder by three criminals. They flee the scene, with the criminals in hot pursuit. What one of the criminals does not know is that he is out to kill his own son.

programme.title: Jhund
programme.desc: Rajesh works for Meena's father. Meena and her friend Taruna decide to play a prank on him. Both women pretend to fall in love with him, but he finds out, resulting in acrimony.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: An estranged couple accidentally meet in a railway station's waiting room and revisit their past.

programme.title: Free Ticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Irumugan - EP 1
programme.desc: Following the attack on the Indian Embassy in Malaysia, Akhilan, an ex-agent, is assigned to track down the culprit. His investigations lead him to his old foe who has now developed a hazardous drug.

programme.title: Vaayai Moodi Pesavum - EP 1
programme.desc: The people of the Panimalai hill station are in trouble as the government has put a ban on speaking to control the spread of the 'dumb-flu' that spreads only through talking.

programme.title: Gypsy - EP 1
programme.desc: Gypsy, a musician, falls in love with Waheeda, who hails from a Muslim family. However, their marital bliss is shattered following a communal riot.

programme.title: Yaan - EP 1
programme.desc: Chandru, a jobless man, vows to get a job after the father of his girlfriend opposes their relationship. His joy on getting a job in an Islamic nation ends when he is nabbed there for carrying drugs.

programme.title: Uppu Karuvadu - EP 1
programme.desc: Chandran, a filmmaker, is forced to cast the producer's daughter, Mahalakshmi, as the heroine in his movie. But Mahalakshmi cannot act and Chandran struggles to teach her how to act.

programme.title: Thiruttu Payale 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: An honest police officer, under orders from a senior official, records conversations of elite professionals. While on duty, he discovers an online sociopath and decides to reveal his identity.

programme.title: Irandam Ulagaporin Kadaisi Gundu - EP 1
programme.desc: Selvam hopes to buy his own lorry and marry his lover Chittu. However, his dreams are disrupted when he ends up with an unexploded bomb.

programme.title: Rathnam - EP 1
programme.desc: Rathnam, a henchman for MLA Panner Selvam, rescues a girl during her interview trip to Vellore. As he becomes her protector, he questions how long he can shield her from danger.

programme.title: Free Ticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Kaari - EP 1
programme.desc: A powerful tycoon controls a helpless village-until a bold jockey arrives. With grit and heart, he races not just horses, but injustice, bringing hope and courage to the people.

programme.title: Theeni - EP 1
programme.desc: Dev, an overweight but genius chef, falls in love with his charming colleague, Tara. However, their love story takes a turn when Maya, a happy-go-lucky woman, enters their lives.

programme.title: Oh My Kadavule - EP 1
programme.desc: Two friends, Anu and Arjun, marry, but misunderstandings complicate their life, leading to a divorce.

programme.title: Idhu Kadhirvelan Kadhal - EP 1
programme.desc: Kathir hates the idea of marriage, but when he falls for his sweet neighbor Pavithra, everything changes. Love blossoms. until heartbreak strikes, teaching him about love and loss.

programme.title: Nanban Oruvan Vantha Piragu - EP 1
programme.desc: Anand, in the travel back to his home to reunite with his friends , looks back at his life in 8 chapters, trying to find an answer to the question of 'What's happiness / Am I happy?

programme.title: Rekka - EP 1
programme.desc: A young man, known for helping couples elope, is forced by a gangster to kidnap a politician's daughter after he stops the wedding of a girl who didn't want to marry him.

programme.title: Sattamum Needhiyum - EP 1
programme.desc: Sundaramoorthy, a timid lawyer, takes on the case of a man who sets himself on fire outside the court to protest his daughter's abduction. Can Sundaramoorthy confront his fears and reveal the truth?

programme.title: Veera - EP 630
programme.desc: Rannvijay raises his half-sister Veera as his own child, while their mother Ratan, though showing contempt towards Veera, secretly supports her son in raising her.

programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. programme.title: Blood VS. Duty
programme.desc: This action drama series pits government agents against a tight-knit fishing community in a high-stakes battle over illegal firearms.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: Hosted by an all-star cast, It's Showtime is a variety show unlike any other. Watch as people from all over come on stage to showcase their skills and creativity in this one-of-a-kind talent show full of fun and prizes.

programme.title: Mitterrand Confidentiel - EP 2

programme.title: Le Dessous Des Cartes - EP 13
programme.desc: The Hamas attack on 7 October 2023 exposed a major flaw in Israeli intelligence services. In a world where war is becoming hybrid, the challenges for secret services are immense. Their ability to inform, influence and manipulate is even one of the primary factors of power.

programme.title: Meurtres a Font-Romeu
programme.desc: Font-Romeu is in shock: Father Baptiste has been murdered. Lieutenant Thomas Errelbaz investigates, but is out of his depth. Newly arrived from Paris, his colleague Julie Delpech is struggling to assert her authority. But she is convinced that a mysterious individual is settling their scores with the past.

programme.desc: The country is submerged by a vast power cut! In an emergency meeting, Harvey and Robillard, CEO of Hydro Quebec, lie to the president about the real cause of the problem. Stephane and Major Zephir continue their investigation into the terrorist threat to the university.

programme.title: La Maison-Bleue - EP 3
programme.desc: Electricity outages are increasingly intense and increasingly frequent throughout Quebec. Harvey has no choice but to explain the reality of the situation to Hamelin. The terrorist threat still hangs over both the university and Gabrielle.

programme.title: Movie - Enn Idhaya Rani

programme.desc: Anasuya, the daughter of a rich woman, falls in love with Aanand. However, they face several obstacles while trying to convince their families about their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Puthiya Mugham
programme.desc: When Shiva saves a group of children from terrorists, he is recruited into the Indian army. Later, he falls in love with Anjali, who is unaware of his real identity.

programme.title: Movie - Engeyum Kadhal
programme.desc: When Kayal, a cellist, learns that Kamal, a businessman who while holidaying in Paris is in danger, she saves him. However, her life turns sour when she falls in love with him but he returns to India.

programme.title: Movie - Puriyatha Puthir
programme.desc: Puriyaadha Puthir is a 1990 Indian Tamil-language mystery thriller written and directed by K. S. Ravikumar.

programme.title: Movie - Thirumalai
programme.desc: Thirumalai, a mechanic, falls in love with Swetha, a young woman. Despite initial differences, she soon reciprocates his feelings, but her father tries to break them up.

programme.title: Movie - Vanna Vanna Pookal
programme.desc: Siva saves a girl from committing suicide and ends up falling in love with her, much to the chagrin of his neighbour Shenbagam, who secretly is in love with him.

programme.title: Movie - Ennai Paar Yogam Varum
programme.desc: Jagadeshwari's marriage gets called off and her father dies of the shock. She vows to take revenge upon Jaga, the man who caused the misfortune.

programme.title: Movie - Ennavoo Pudichirukku
programme.desc: Santosh swears revenge on a woman named Sangeetha who slapped him after rejecting his advances. However, his quest for vengeance gets complicated when he learns that Sangeetha is his brother's lover.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 11 MAY
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 6
programme.desc: As far as cult heroes go, few are as beloved as Dimitar Berbatov. In a seven-year Premier League career, the Bulgarian set the league alight with his grace and elegance with the ball at this feet. This week, Berbatov sits down with PL Moments to reflect on his career and pick out his stand out memories from a glittering Premier League career.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 12 MAY
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW36 Tottenham Hotspur v Leeds United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: EXTRA TIME - MON 11 MAY
programme.desc: A look at a Premier League season through the eyes of a player who excelled that particular year. The highs and lows and everything in between, that made it a memorable and at times defining nine months for both the player and his club.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Danny Murphy's first season with Fulham proved to be one to remember. The Cottagers' 2007/08 campaign saw them go from doomed to defiant in a matter of matches, rescued at the very last moment, with Murphy playing a pivotal role.

programme.title: GENERATION xG - MON 11 MAY
programme.desc: A deep dive into the tactical trends and statistical insights of modern football with input from players, managers and data experts from the 'fanalyst' community.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 39
programme.desc: Dominic Calvert-Lewin has been Leeds United's star striker since their return to the Premier League, but it's not always been plain sailing for the 29-year-old, as he's faced his own battles off the pitch. This week on The Big Interview, Calvert-Lewin opens up on battling with anxiety at a young age, leaving Everton, fighting off relegation with Leeds and how speaking about his own mental health has had a positive effect on his life.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. Kewell revisits his electrifying rise at Leeds United, before confronting the intense scrutiny and expectation that came with his move to Liverpool and then Galatasaray. He opens up about the injuries, pressure, and moments at Anfield that nearly drove him away from the game altogether.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: We dive into the fiercest rivalry in English football-Manchester United and Liverpool. As Liverpool draw level with United's record haul of top-flight titles, this is a story of history, pride, and the relentless pursuit of greatness. With insight from icons on both sides-Ian Rush, Lou Macari, Brian Kidd, Michael Owen, Phil Thompson, and new Liverpool boss Arne Slot, we unpack the moments that have defined generations, split families, and lit up the Premier League.

programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City's Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: With over 300 appearances for Arsenal, Martin Keown is an iconic figure at the North London club. A member of the Invincibles, Keown was a graduate of the Arsenal academy before moving to Aston Villa and then Everton before returning to Highbury. A three-time Premier League champion, Keown sits down with PL Moments to talk us through his remarkable journey and select his top ten moments from throughout his time in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL Moments 2025/26 - EP 9
programme.desc: In a career spanning nearly two decades, Gary Cahill claimed every prize available in his illustrious career. Two Premier League titles, two FA Cups, a Champions League winner and many more - the Derbyshire born Centre Back left an indelible mark on the English game. This week, Cahill sits down on the PL Moments sofa to reflect on his journey and talk us though his top 10 Premier League career moments.

programme.desc: Since losing 2-0 against Spurs in their opening home league game this season, Man City are unbeaten in their last 16 at the Etihad (W13 D3). They’ve also opened the scoring in all 16 of these games.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Chad Dawson vs. Antonio Tarver II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Light Heavyweight 'Bad' Chad Dawson (27-0, 17 KOs) vs. Antonio 'Magic Man' Tarver (27-5, 19 KOs). Held at the Hard Rock Hotel and Casino, Las Vegas, Nevada, USA on May 9, 2009, it's Dawson's first defense of the IBF Light Heavyweight and IBO Light Heavyweight titles.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Floyd Mayweather vs. Felipe Garcia
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS presents another exciting Greatest Classics episode, bringing you more action featuring the greatest fighters in boxing history. One of the all-time greats is featured just one year from making his pro debut, as a 10-0 "Pretty Boy"Floyd Mayweather - long before he became "Money" - has a tough test against Felipe Garcia of Mexico.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Winky Wright
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight title contest featuring 47-4-1 Bernard Hopkins and the 51-3-1 Winky Wright, who has not lost a bout in over seven years.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the 21-0 James Kirkland facing off with the 21-1 Eromosele Albert. Just a little over a minute into this bout, following a combination of punches, the bout comes to a close.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 features Chiyotairyu, Aoiyama, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Tyson Fury vs. Steve Cunningham
programme.desc: This episode features a Heavyweight bout between the unpredictable and unbeaten Tyson Fury as we works his way up the ranks taking on former champ Steve Cunningham, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features two-time UFC champion and Hall of Famer Randy "The Natural" Couture and his buddies firing up their motorcycles for a good cause, plus an interview with one of MMA's biggest stars, "Rowdy" Ronda Rousey. We've got another installment of the gun store challenge this time with Thiago Alves, plus we go behind the scenes for a photo shoot with ring girl Arianny Celeste, exclusively on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Amanda Lino vs. Manon Fiorot
programme.desc: Check out exciting action from MMA organizations around the world. This episode features Amanda "MadDog" Lino vs. Manon Fiorot from EFC 83 in Pretoria, South Africa.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Carlos Manuel Baldomir vs. Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features welterweights Carlos Manuel Baldomir, aka 'Tata' (42-9, 12 KOs) vs. Arturo 'Thunder' Gatti (40-7, 31 KOs) in a bout to unify the WBC and IBA titles. The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 22, 2006.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Fukuoka, Japan welcomes the top talent in the world of martial arts when Karate 1 Premier League returns. Fukuoka will host athletes from across the globe including last season's Grand Winners such as Hikaru Ono and Ayaka Saito competing in their home country. The World Karate Federation expects another tremendous turnout, featuring Olympic medalists and world-ranked competitors, when the Karate 1 Premier League visits the port city of Fukuoka, Japan, on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jean Pascal vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. The fight ends in a decision after a controverial headbutt.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Orlando Qualifier tackle the Orlando Finals course, which includes the Salmon Ladder, Cannonball Alley, Helix Hang and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Joe Calzaghe vs. Roy Jones, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship fight featuring Joe Calzaghe and Roy Jones, Jr. This epic bout would prove to be the last of Calzage's career. Many wanted him to retire because he had nothing left to prove, and Calzaghe would officially do so 3 months later. Also on the card, Chris Arreola shows everyone why he is a heavyweight contender.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: Top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 4 features Abi, Kakuryu, Hakuho and Shodaii from the Osaka Prefectural Gymnasium in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Hague Grand Prix and we follow some of Netherlands' judo heroes as they try to mark the event with a medal tally to be proud of.

programme.title: Pariah: Sonny Liston
programme.desc: Was Sonny Liston murdered? This four-part documentary series explores the life and untimely death of boxing legend Charles 'Sonny' Liston, who became the heavyweight champion of the world when he knocked out Floyd Patterson in 1962. Unfortunately, just eight years later, he was found dead in his Las Vegas home from an alleged heroin overdose. Suspicion regarding the real cause of his death has continued to this day. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 102
programme.desc: Po eats Tubby Custard and gets a messy bib. Po washes the bib clean and hangs it out to dry before eating more Tubby Custard with Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 16
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'shark' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of sharks! There's a pointy nosed shark and a big fin shark, a speedy shark and a grey and white shark.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: OKIDO is covered in ice, and Messy must find a way to melt it before it's too late.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: There's a storm brewing after Glitch's fake weather report puts the cadets in danger.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Andy heads to Canada in his safari-mobile and meets a chipmunk collecting acorns.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 44
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 43
programme.desc: In this aerial adventure the Go Jetters are on the Strait of Gibraltar, Southern Spain to follow a group of migrating baby stalks as they make their journey from Spain to Africa.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 6
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 32
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck are spending a day at the beach, aiming to build some sand animals.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 46
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 45
programme.desc: Myrtle, Sophie and Benjamin call Stanley to teach them how to make a sandcastle. Myrtle asks for a bigger one, so big it turns into a sandcastle resort!

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: The talking animals chat about all the fun stuff about where they live.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: When JoJo runs out of story-books to read, she visits the Library with Gran Gran and gets her own library card! JoJo learns all about the Library and discovers how amazing it is!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Duggee takes the Squirrels and their parents on an exciting mystery trip.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: After a pod of pilot whales becomes stranded at the Academy beach, the Go Jetters, with help from new teacher Professor Wave, must work fast to return them to the ocean deeps.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Gooseberry sings a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 7
programme.desc: Evil Pea causes chaos in the veggie aisle with a trolley loaded to the brim with stinky cheese. Supertato and Broccoli must use the Tato Car to get rid of the stink.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 103
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are flamenco dancing! Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po are surprisingly good.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'lemon' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a yellow lemon, a leafy lemon, a juicy lemon and a sour lemon.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 22
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 39
programme.desc: A trip to see fireflies becomes a rescue when Xuli and Glitch get stuck in a swamp.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Not wanting to go to bed, Bluey tries to dream about being a nocturnal fruit bat so she can stay up all night long and soon finds herself flying through the night sky.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Andy's Safari Adventures (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Andy heads to Africa to meet some meerkats and record their alarm call on his gizmo.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 35
programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 45
programme.desc: After watching a solar eclipse, the team head into space to fix the biggest glitch yet!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 44
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are on Whistler Mountain in Canada doing some skiing and checking out the amazing cable car which runs high up between the mountains.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 7
programme.desc: Nia is excited about being asked to transport a new elephant to the animal park, but the animal is scared of steam trains.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 33
programme.desc: The Bubble Man is in town so a visit to the Big Shop is in order for Sarah, Duck and Donkey.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 34
programme.desc: After Sarah helps Scarf Lady prepare the wool for her new roof, she settles down for a dreamy sleep.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 47
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 46
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: From riding cows to having pigs in the house, the funny animals chat about everything brilliant about farms.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: JoJo & Gran Gran have their own sports day with Jared and Cynthia, but when JoJo isn't fast enough to win the races, Gran Gran suggests JoJo try the egg and spoon race instead!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret".

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: Supertato (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 103
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are flamenco dancing! Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po are surprisingly good.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'lemon' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see a yellow lemon, a leafy lemon, a juicy lemon and a sour lemon.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.desc: From biblical patriarchs to modern-day alien abductees, there have been people who claimed to have contact with otherworldly beings. Could it be that they have been chosen to help carry out alien agenda?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3) - EP 16
programme.desc: On the last day of the season, the hunters gather to target breeding females. Bill and Tes investigate a secluded stretch of islands. Dusty hopes to go out with a bang.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes With Morgan Freeman (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: A man with aspirations to writing crime novels ends up the star of his own breakout story when he tries to escape from one of Mississippi's oldest and most notorious prison farms, Parchman Penitentiary.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 13
programme.desc: They've been called the world's greatest archaeological enigma. 2,000-year-old geoglyphs made in the Peruvian desert that span over 50 miles. The drawings are so massive, they can be seen from the air.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16) - EP 257
programme.desc: From biblical patriarchs to modern-day alien abductees, there have been people who claimed to have contact with otherworldly beings. Could it be that they have been chosen to help carry out alien agenda?

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the outrageous toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up, as we uncover explosive science kits and more.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII - EP 6
programme.desc: Racing an incoming hurricane, Darrell Miklos and his team are forced to make tough choices. But after a season-long search, they locate the source of the massive magnetometer hit recorded at Target 4.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: For centuries, powerful artefacts have sparked wars, inspired legends, and shaped empires. From divine weapons to sacred relics-these are the incredible stories of the world's most mighty marvels.

programme.title: The Death Coast - EP 4
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team battles thick kelp, brutal currents, and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Island's coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15) - EP 5
programme.desc: A drought and sweltering temperatures drop water levels to their lowest point in decades, and access to the best honey holes in the swamp are nearly impassable. Hunters take huge risks to fill tags.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13) - EP 12
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 12
programme.desc: The evidence is building, and the team believes they are finally zeroing in on the Treasure Vault. With confidence at an all-time high, the Fellowship prepares to retrieve it as they call in the caissons.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: The dangerous, emotional, and arduous toll of stealth ops has never been felt more deeply than by those who adopted completely separate personas to integrate themselves into a shadowy underworld.

programme.title: 1942: Fighting For India: The Women Who Dared
programme.desc: With the British in a weakened state of war, idealistic young women from Malaya's rubber plantations joined Chandra Bose in the fight for India's independence.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: From a mythical monster that turns out to be real to one of the deadliest prehistoric animals on the planet, these startling discoveries shock and terrify the world.

programme.title: Alone (S11) - EP 6
programme.desc: As the competition continues to drain the survivalists, they soon face a reckoning with the strategies they've implemented. All of them seem to be teetering over the edge.

programme.title: Building Batavia
programme.desc: In 1619, the Dutch took control of what is now Jakarta and tried to turn it into a tropical Amsterdam. How did they do it, and what remains of their grand plan?

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: In the 1950s, middle-aged salesman Ray Kroc is drowning in debt when he's inspired by a roadside burger stand he wants to spread nationwide-McDonald's.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: It's 1935, and a hot-headed Kentucky gas station owner named Harland Sanders develops a new method for making fried chicken, drawing customers from far and wide.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 28
programme.desc: The Founding Fathers established the pillars of freedom and democracy. New information has emerged about the secrets of these important historical figures. What truths have remained in the shadows?

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3) - EP 29
programme.desc: The American frontier is rich with legends of Native Americans and outlaws, but also eerie tales of cursed mountains, monsters, and UFOs. Could these tales be true? Is the Wild West stranger than we think?

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bad decisions cause people to get booked in, including a first-timer that resisted arrest for riding their bicycle on the wrong side of the road, a couple that had half a pound of meth.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8) - EP 16
programme.desc: The husband and father of a murdered family attacks their killer in court; a judge has no patience for a foul-mouthed defendant; a convicted drunk driver begs the judge for mercy; and more.

programme.title: The Sorcerer From Hell
programme.desc: With the help of his three wives, an Indonesian witch doctor called Ahmad Suradji admitted to killing 42 women over a period of 11 years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 9
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 522
programme.desc: In Mobile, a father of four is found dead inside a car after a mysterious crash, and detectives discover that his death was no accident.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2) - EP 6
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a naked man makes a scene on a Miami Beach; a drunk driver finds a strange and dangerous place to relieve himself; and more!

programme.desc: Police are hard-pressed to find solid leads when a 19-year-old girl vanishes without a trace.

programme.desc: When the battered body of Shawna Yandell, 16, is found floating in Washington State's Yakima River in 1993, detectives first suspect those closest to her.

programme.desc: Tulsa homicide delves into a dark world of drugs and prostitution to solve the murder of a man executed in his car in a motel parking lot.

programme.desc: A tragic car crash leads to the death of an 89-year-old woman. Her daughter, who was behind the wheel, is blamed for her death and faces a life behind bars. Carless driver or devastated crash survivor?

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 119
programme.desc: When a beloved son and brother is murdered just feet from his home, his family has one question: Why? It's up to a determined team of Gwinnett County investigators to get their defiant suspect to talk.

programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 3
programme.desc: When the supposed great-niece of Marilyn Monroe, Krystal Jean Baker, 13, is found dead beneath a bridge in Texas' Bayou Country, investigators are stumped.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 4
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 9
programme.desc: When a Georgia college student disappears, police open an investigation into a possible hate crime and abduction. However, Dr. Jamie Downs uncovers evidence that spins the case in a new direction.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S4) - EP 3
programme.desc: A man falls asleep while driving and kills a construction worker on the road. Was he a reckless driver or an innocent man with an undiagnosed medical condition?

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 5
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 1
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 2
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man is charged with domestic terrorism after a spree of shootings on the freeway sends the public into panic. Facing over 100 years in prison, the young father claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Steve encounters the largest and most sophisticated hunters on the planet, revealing how the ingenious strategies used by whales can sometimes get these extraordinary predators in trouble.

programme.desc: In Paris, Sue samples insects and absinthe, models for Paris Fashion Week, and crashes a cabaret.

programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, our ancient powers are just beginning, they must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.desc: Discover how smooth caramel and milky chocolate combine with pretzels to produce a perfect salty sweet snack; the makers of Jelly Bellys get those mouth-watering flavours into their jellybeans; lip-smacking Korean dumplings are jam-packed with savory spices and healthy veggies.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2) - EP 16
programme.desc: Discover how sweet and crunchy Boston Baked Beans are made to be the candy version of a traditional side dish; the tangy strawberry filling in a Welch's fruit yogurt snack receives a creamy coating; brocato, a cheesy Scottish breakfast pie, gets its stand up pastry shell.

programme.title: Joanna Lumley's Danube: Europe's Mightiest River (S1) - EP 4
programme.desc: Joanna heads towards the Danube Delta, one of the last great wilderness areas remaining in Europe, full of birdlife including the majestic Pelican. At the mouth of the river, on Romania's Black Sea coast, Joanna bids farewell to the Danube and reflects on her amazing journey.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 74
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nuclear power is attempting a comeback, but producing the necessary fuel is complex. From mining to enrichment, can new technologies and supply chains scale to power the next generation of reactors?

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype?

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. The content focuses on exciting new trends, fashion, and cultural topics across a range of disciplines both in China and abroad. The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 32 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep. 96
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Songs of Our Generation
programme.desc: The music program, hosted by Oizumi Yo, presents the greatest hits of J-pop from the 1960s to the present with high-quality sound and footage.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial "Radio Star" Ep. 28
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there’s no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there’s no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Familiarization with Japanese Traditional Performing Arts
programme.desc: The program introduces Japanese Traditional Performing Arts at a polite yet good pace to those who find them hard to approach.
